summary: The user is seeking advice on improving sleep quality and has recently started a relaxing bedtime routine that includes warm baths on Tuesdays and Thursdays. They are considering incorporating mindfulness exercises and adjusting their wake-up time to help with sleep issues, particularly on Sundays when they feel stressed about the upcoming week.
facts: The user takes warm baths before bed on Tuesdays and Thursdays to relax. The user has been writing down three things they are grateful for each day in a journal before bed. The user has been setting their alarm for 7:30 AM every day but hits the snooze button 2-3 times before getting out of bed. The user plans to set their alarm 15 minutes earlier each day to gradually adjust their wake-up time. The user is considering incorporating gentle stretches and basic meditation into their Sunday routine to help calm their mind and body. The user has been reading before bed on Tuesdays and Thursdays as part of their relaxation routine. The user is interested in getting morning sunlight to help regulate their circadian rhythms. The user experiences trouble sleeping on Sundays due to stress about the upcoming week.
